prompt: New repo for our AWS infrastructure as Terraform. It'll have multiple modules, one per region (global, sa-east-1, us-east-1) under modules/. I want the standard init/plan/apply/fmt/check flow where I pass which module to act on, and we also deploy a few things to EKS so kubectl and helm need to be on hand. Apply should be careful — show a plan and confirm before it changes anything.
assertions: every task file follows the contract
aws-auth helper present, no leaked internals
